title: AOS Verifier Output
description: Canonical schema for verifier output artifacts (UAT results).

schemaVersion.description: The schema version of this artifact.

runId.description: The unique identifier for the execution run.

criterionId.description: The ID of the criterion that was checked.

isRequired.description: Whether this check was required for overall success.

message.description: Diagnostic message or error details for this check.

actualValue.description: The actual value or state observed during the check.

issueId.description: The identifier of the issue created for a failure.

criterionId.description: The ID of the criterion that triggered this issue.

issuePath.description: Workspace-relative path to the issue artifact.
